subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Your pure-hearted brother hath crossed the ocean and arrived at the blessed and luminous Spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء برادر پاک گهر شما قطع دریا نمود و ببقعه مبارکه نوراء وارد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Shrines and Holy places, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
